title: Approved satellite targets for control-link bridge sync
policy: Only paths listed here may receive bridge writes.
The hub script never enumerates arbitrary PC folders; set enabled=true only for intentional satellites.
NAS targets stay disabled or NAS_WAIT until mount verification; the sync script does not create NAS trees.

satellites.name: Z_Labs (sibling capsule)
satellites.notes: Operator: disable if this machine does not host Z_Labs at this path.

satellites.name: Future NAS satellite (declaration only)
satellites.notes: Keep disabled until Synology volume is mounted and path verified; then enable cautiously.
